name: Toge Inumaki
description: I make characters exclusively MLM because I personally love MLM and some of the ones I need are often not there, so I create and will create MLM myself. I share these characters for general access exclusively, if suddenly someone will find them useful and he/she shares my interests and favorite characters, of course you can ask me in the comments to make someone else, but it will be MLM. Cases not MLM, I myself wished to do for everyone, but this action is rare.
creator: Katsuhiro
